news.title: Loongson Announces 3A6000 Processor with Significant Performance Improvements
news.summary: Loongson Technology has officially launched the 3A6000 quad-core processor featuring the new LA664 microarchitecture, delivering substantial performance improvements over the previous generation.
news.content:
Loongson Technology has announced the official launch of the 3A6000 quad-core processor, representing a significant advancement in the company's desktop processor lineup. The new processor features the LA664 microarchitecture, which delivers approximately 30% higher single-threaded performance compared to the previous 3A5000 generation.

Key improvements in the 3A6000 include:

- New LA664 out-of-order execution core with enhanced branch prediction
- Improved memory subsystem with larger caches and higher bandwidth
- Support for DDR4-3200 memory with dual-channel configuration
- Enhanced integrated graphics for smoother desktop experience
- Maintained 35W TDP while delivering higher performance
- Full compatibility with existing Loongson software ecosystem

The 3A6000 is sampling now to strategic customers, with volume production scheduled for Q2 2026. Development boards and reference designs are available for immediate evaluation.

As an authorized Loongson distributor, we are prepared to support customer migration to the 3A6000 platform with evaluation hardware, technical support, and supply chain services. Contact our sales team for samples and pricing information.

news.title: Major Chinese University Deploys 10,000+ Loongson Computers
news.summary: Leading technical university completes large-scale deployment of Loongson-based computers across campus computer labs, research facilities, and administrative offices.
news.content:
A major Chinese technical university has completed the deployment of over 10,000 Loongson-based computers across its campus, marking one of the largest educational deployments of domestic processor technology to date.

The deployment includes:

- 6,000 desktop computers for student computer labs and libraries
- 2,000 workstations for research laboratories and engineering departments
- 1,500 administrative desktops for faculty and staff
- 500 servers for campus IT infrastructure and research computing

All systems run Kylin OS and Loongnix, with comprehensive software support including development tools, office applications, and specialized academic software. The university reports high user satisfaction and smooth operation since deployment.

This deployment demonstrates the readiness of Loongson technology for large-scale institutional use and provides a model for other educational institutions considering domestic technology adoption.

LiTong Electronics is proud to have supported this deployment as an authorized Loongson distributor, providing hardware supply, technical support, and integration services.

news.title: Loongson 2K1000 Receives Industrial Certifications for Harsh Environments
news.summary: The Loongson 2K1000 embedded processor has received multiple industrial certifications validating its reliability for use in harsh environmental conditions.
news.content:
Loongson Technology has announced that the 2K1000 embedded processor has successfully completed rigorous testing and received certifications for industrial applications:

- IEC 60068-2-1 Cold Testing (-40°C operation verified)
- IEC 60068-2-2 Dry Heat Testing (+85°C operation verified)
- IEC 60068-2-6 Vibration Testing (industrial vibration resistance)
- IEC 60068-2-27 Shock Testing (mechanical shock resistance)
- IEC 61000-4-2 ESD Testing (electrostatic discharge immunity)

These certifications validate the 2K1000's suitability for deployment in industrial automation, transportation, energy infrastructure, and other harsh environment applications. The processor's industrial temperature grade (-40°C to +85°C) combined with these certifications provides customers with confidence for mission-critical deployments.

The certifications apply to both the processor and reference designs, enabling faster time-to-market for industrial equipment manufacturers.

LiTong Electronics provides industrial-grade 2K1000 products with full certification documentation and long-term supply agreements for industrial customers.

news.title: Loongson Software Ecosystem Expands with Major Application Ports
news.summary: Growing software ecosystem for LoongArch architecture as major applications and development tools announce native support.
news.content:
The Loongson software ecosystem continues to expand rapidly with announcements of native LoongArch support from major software vendors and open-source projects:

Recent additions include:

- **WPS Office 2024** - Full native version with complete feature parity
- **Visual Studio Code** - Official Microsoft build for LoongArch
- **Docker 25.0** - Container platform with native LoongArch support
- **Kubernetes 1.29** - Container orchestration platform
- **MySQL 8.3** - Database server optimized for LoongArch
- **Qt 6.6** - Cross-platform development framework
- **Blender 4.0** - 3D creation suite with rendering optimizations

In addition, the LoongArch Linux kernel support has been upstreamed to mainline Linux 6.8, ensuring long-term maintenance and compatibility.

The growing software ecosystem addresses one of the key requirements for widespread Loongson adoption, providing users with the applications and tools they need for productive computing.

LiTong Electronics works closely with software vendors to ensure compatibility and optimization for Loongson platforms. Contact us for software availability and compatibility information.

news.title: Loongson Selected for Provincial Government Desktop Refresh Program
news.summary: Major provincial government selects Loongson-based computers for large-scale desktop refresh initiative emphasizing technology independence.
news.content:
A provincial government in China has selected Loongson-based desktop computers for a comprehensive refresh of government IT infrastructure, representing a significant milestone in domestic technology adoption.

The program includes:

- 15,000 desktop computers for government offices
- 3,000 laptops for mobile workers
- 500 servers for data centers
- Complete migration of office applications and workflows
- Training programs for 20,000+ government employees

The selection criteria emphasized technology independence, supply chain security, total cost of ownership, and software ecosystem maturity. Loongson platforms met all requirements with competitive performance and comprehensive software support.

Deployment is scheduled to complete by end of 2026, with pilot programs already underway in select departments. Early feedback indicates positive user acceptance and smooth operation.

This deployment reinforces the trend of government organizations adopting domestic technology solutions and provides a reference model for other provinces considering similar initiatives.

LiTong Electronics is honored to support this initiative as an authorized Loongson distributor, providing products, technical support, and deployment services.
